articles.title: NFL won't host supplemental draft, making Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby ineligible in 2026 - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Brendan Sorsby won't be heading to the NFL in 2026.
articles.content:
Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby was set on taking his talents to the NFL in 2026 only the league had another idea. The NFL will not hold a supplemental draft in 2026.
The decision means Sorsby… [+6462 chars]
